## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New mapping rule
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] Added/updated golden-file test under `tests/cases/`
- [ ] `terraform init && terraform validate` passes on the affected fixture(s)
- [ ] Updated `docs/coverage.md` if a new ARM type is now supported
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (e.g. `feat: support Microsoft.Foo/bar`)
